states.description: Bluecoins main dashboard with calendar and budget summary
visual_cues: Daily Summary / Budget Summary pie chart
Advanced Filter, Export Data, Search icons in app bar

states.description: Calendar view with Add buttons and navigate arrows; per-date drilldown
visual_cues: Go to previous / Go to next

states.description: Form screen to add/edit a single transaction
Select Icon modal (triggered unexpectedly by tapping a transaction row)
Dialog to select or create a Label
Per-category transaction list (e.g. after save landing page showing Salary/Others with Running Total)

visual_cues: While using the app / Only this time / Don't allow buttons

transitions.action: click(FAB +) then may auto-open editor OR click(transaction row amount area)
click(transaction row icon/label area) or long_press(row)
transitions.postcondition: Select Icon dialog shown (unintended entry point for editing)

transitions.action: click(Don’t allow / While using the app)

strategies.name: QUERY_DAILY_TOTAL_OR_CATEGORY_SPEND
steps: read the Budget Summary / Daily Summary 'Actual' value for the target date (already visible)
strategies.success_signal: Daily/Budget Summary shows Actual amount for target date; answer returned
strategies.fallback: If not visible, click Transactions tab and sum amounts for the date

strategies.name: QUERY_TRANSACTION_CATEGORY_OR_COUNT
steps: locate the date header and read/count the entries (category labels like 'Others', 'Salary', 'Bonus')
strategies.success_signal: Transaction rows for target date are visible and counted/identified
strategies.fallback: Scroll the list if the date header is off-screen

strategies.name: EDIT_TRANSACTION_VIA_ROW_AMOUNT
steps: click the amount-text portion of the target transaction row (NOT the icon/label area) -> transaction_editor
click date field -> date_picker_dialog; click target day; click OK
click amount field; long_press to select all; delete; input new amount
click Notes field; input new note
click Labels field if label change needed; input label; OK
strategies.success_signal: returns to category detail view / transactions list showing updated values
strategies.fallback: If clicking opens icon_selector_dialog, press NONE and try clicking a different area of the row (amount text)

strategies.name: CHANGE_TRANSACTION_TYPE_AND_NOTE
strategies.preconditions: starting from transaction_editor on the target row
steps: click(EXPENSE or INCOME tab) to flip type
click(Notes field) and input_text the note
strategies.success_signal: list view reflects new type (color/sign) and note text visible
strategies.fallback: If editor not reached, open row via amount click or retry

dead_ends.note: Often the editor screen did not open from the agent's perspective even though it may have; agent looped clicking the + button. Verify UI state changed before retrying.

dead_ends.failed_action: click or long_press on transaction row icon/label area
dead_ends.note: Opens Select Icon dialog instead of editor. Click on the amount text area instead to open the editor.

dead_ends.failed_action: input_text over existing amount without clearing
dead_ends.note: Text gets appended (e.g. '5,000.0520.000'). Long-press to select all then delete, or use keyboard backspace before typing the new value.

dead_ends.failed_action: click Add (+) header icon then repeatedly navigate back via Calendar Settings
dead_ends.note: Agent accidentally entered Calendar settings; needs to use the list-view FAB or click a transaction row directly.

dead_ends.failed_action: Prematurely answer status(complete) on Query tasks after navigating to Transactions without verifying match of date/amount
dead_ends.note: Led to false positives for add-transaction tasks (confused existing entry with a newly-added one).

categories.name: CREATE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: App launched and on a list/dashboard view that exposes a creation affordance (e.g. floating action button or equivalent primary create control)
abstract_steps: Navigate to the list view where new items are created
Trigger the create affordance (primary create control) and wait for the entry form to appear
If a type toggle is present, choose the correct type (e.g. one of the mutually exclusive categories offered)
Set required fields one by one: amount/value, date (via date picker if needed), category/label, note/description
When modifying a pre-filled field, clear existing text (select-all then remove, or use backspace) before typing
Confirm/save via the primary save action
Verify the new item appears in the list with the correct values
failure_modes: Repeated taps on create button without detecting whether the entry form actually opened
Typing into a field without clearing pre-existing text, leading to concatenated values
Tapping the wrong sub-area of a row and opening a secondary dialog instead of the entry form
Declaring task complete based on an unrelated pre-existing entry
verification_checklist: Entry form was observed (not just list) before entering data
All target fields show the intended final values before saving
Post-save list contains a new entry with matching amount/date/type/note

categories.name: MODIFY_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Target item is visible in a list and its detail form is accessible via tapping the row
abstract_steps: Locate target item by date/amount/category
Open its detail form by tapping the text/amount region of the row (avoid icon/label area that may open a picker)
Clear and replace each target field (amount, date, type, note, label)
Use the date picker for date changes and confirm with the positive action
Save with the primary confirm action
Verify the row now shows the updated values
failure_modes: Opening an unrelated modal (icon/label picker) instead of the detail form
Appending text to a field instead of replacing it
Saving without toggling type when required
Claiming success without confirming updated values in the list
verification_checklist: Each modified field reflects the new value in the form before save
After save, list shows updated values and correct sign/type
Aggregate totals or summaries reflect the change when applicable

categories.name: REMOVE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Target item is visible and its detail form or context menu offers a removal action
abstract_steps: Open the target item's detail form or context menu
Invoke the destructive/removal action from the available controls of the opened view (e.g. a trash/discard control)
Confirm removal if prompted via the positive/accept action
Verify removal from the list
failure_modes: Long-pressing invokes a different action (e.g. icon or label selection) rather than the intended removal flow
Dismissing confirmation prematurely
Removing the wrong row due to duplicates
verification_checklist: Target row no longer appears in list

categories.name: QUERY_INFO
categories.precondition: App is launched and the requested summary or list view is reachable
abstract_steps: Open the app and go to the view that surfaces the requested datum (dashboard summary for totals, list view for counts/categories)
Read the already-displayed value for the target date/category
Respond with an answer action containing the value
Mark the task complete
failure_modes: Miscounting due to including summary/header rows
Reporting a pre-existing value when the task was to create a new one
Answering before scrolling to ensure all relevant rows are seen
verification_checklist: Answered value matches what is visible for the specified date/category
Counted only actual item rows, excluding headers/totals

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO
abstract_steps: Identify the top-level tab or drawer entry matching the target section
Tap the tab/drawer item
Confirm the expected section header/content is visible
failure_modes: Clicking a header icon that opens an auxiliary configuration view instead of the intended section
Not waiting for the view to load before interacting
verification_checklist: Target section's characteristic UI is visible

categories.name: PICK_DATE_FROM_PICKER
categories.precondition: A date picker dialog is open
abstract_steps: Use month navigation arrows to reach the target month/year
Tap the target day in the grid
Confirm with the positive/accept button
failure_modes: Tapping the dismiss/negative button instead of the positive/accept button
Selecting the wrong day due to misreading the grid
verification_checklist: Form's date field shows the selected date

categories.name: CREATE_LABEL_OR_CATEGORY
categories.precondition: A label/category selection dialog is open
abstract_steps: If the desired value isn't in the list, tap the new-value input field
Type the new label text
Confirm with the positive/accept button to create and apply it
failure_modes: Typing in the wrong field and creating duplicates
Confirming before the text is entered
verification_checklist: Form shows the new label applied to the entry
